# Static Print Reference Preview Assets

These files are mirrored only for browser preview of curated static reference designs.

- `1251061`: `Corsi-Rosenthal Air Filter 140mm PC Fans 16x20x1" Furnace Filters` by neurocean on Printables, CC-BY.
- `955827`: `Air Filter/purifier based on the Corsi-Rosenthal box` by Safetydave1 on Printables, CC-BY.

The `610219` modular 20x20 reference is intentionally not mirrored here because its Printables license is CC-BY-NC-SA. It is linked from the UI instead.
